company_core.name: CYDELPHI
company_core.description: The main product is an automated incident response platform that manages the complete lifecycle of cybersecurity incidents, utilizing AI-driven workflows and structured methodologies such as playbooks and runbooks to enhance recovery efficiency. It features a multi-tenant command center for remote deployment, evidence collection, and threat analysis, while leveraging a data lake for rapid access to critical information.

agent_output.markdown:
# CYDELPHI | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
CyDelphi is a seed-stage automated cybersecurity incident response platform founded in 2024, having raised $3M from Glasswing Ventures and Blu Ventures. The company is very early with minimal web presence and a concerning headcount contraction of ~17% in the last 90 days — red flags worth probing directly in this meeting.

---

## Company Overview
CyDelphi offers an AI-driven incident response platform that manages the full lifecycle of cybersecurity incidents via playbooks, runbooks, and automated workflows. The platform includes a multi-tenant command center supporting remote deployment, evidence collection, and threat analysis, backed by a data lake architecture for rapid information access. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

- **Stage:** Seed [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
- **Founded:** 2024 [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
- **Total Raised:** $3M (last round closed February 2026) [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
- **Investors:** Glasswing Ventures, Blu Ventures [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
- **Headcount:** 5 [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
- **Web Traffic:** 430 [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## Key Points
• **Very early-stage company** — founded 2024 with only 5 employees, suggesting the product is likely pre-revenue or in very early commercial stages. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **$3M seed round recently closed** (February 2026), providing near-term runway, but the small team size limits execution capacity. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Headcount has declined 16.7% in the last 90 days** — at a 5-person company, this represents at least one departure, which is disproportionately significant and warrants direct explanation. [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Web traffic of 430 is extremely low**, indicating minimal market awareness or early-stage go-to-market activity. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Only one named leader identified** — Doron Kolton, VP Engineering — with no CEO, CTO, or commercial leadership identified in available data. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## Recent Developments
• Closed a $3M seed round on February 12, 2026, backed by Glasswing Ventures and Blu Ventures. [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)[[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• No other recent news or product announcements found in available data. [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## Signals & Trends
• ⚠️ **Headcount contraction of -16.7% over 90 days** at a 5-person company is a meaningful signal — could indicate a co-founder departure, early team instability, or a strategic pivot. [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• Web traffic data shows no growth trend available yet; current volume of 430 suggests negligible organic traction. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)[[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• No web traffic change data available to assess directional momentum. [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## For This Meeting

**Key Questions to Ask:**
• Who leads the company? No CEO or commercial leadership is identified in available data — clarify the full founding team and org structure.
• What caused the headcount reduction? Who left, and why?
• What is the current product status — is this live, in beta, or still in development?
• Do you have any paying customers or signed pilots? What does early GTM look like?
• How are you deploying the $3M seed capital, and what milestones does it fund?

**Risks to Probe:**
• **Team thinness and attrition** at 5 people is a critical execution risk, especially post-departure. [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **No visible commercial traction** — web traffic and lack of news suggest the company has not yet broken through to market. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Leadership gap** — absence of identified CEO/GTM leadership is a structural concern for a B2B SaaS company needing enterprise sales. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

**Areas Needing Clarification:**
• Full leadership team composition and equity/role structure.
• Competitive differentiation vs. established incident response platforms.
• Customer pipeline and revenue status — not found in available data.
